auth.description: Credentials + Google OAuth, JWT, roles, password reset, security events

video.description: HLS playback, R2/CDN, skip intro/credits, speed, subtitles, watch progress, clip mode

works.description: Film/series CRUD, episodes, trailers, previews, publishing workflow

subtitles.description: Upload, translate, VTT generation, per-language tracks

notify_me_cta.description: Per-work CTA with smart gate (full film / last episode / trailer-only), onEnded trigger

casting.description: Roles, applications, AI agent review, admin decisions, 8 status emails with poster

email_transactional.description: Microsoft Graph sender, open/click tracking, suppression check, log

email_bulk.description: ACS/Graph bulk sender, EmailQueue table, queue processor, suppression enforced

email_admin.description: Queue (retry/cancel/bulk), logs (delete/clear-old, open/click tracking), suppression (bulk), templates, engagement stats

comments.description: Nested comments (1 level), likes, reports, admin moderation, rate limited

analytics.description: Beacon events, visitor sessions, watch events, admin overview

users_admin.description: User list, role management, suspension, audit log

security.description: Login throttle (DB-backed), security events, device tracking, audit log, security alerts

rate_limiting.description: In-memory sliding window (per-instance). Applied: comments, notify-me. Login uses DB-backed checkLoginThrottle.
rate_limiting.known_gap: Per-instance only. Upgrade to Upstash Redis for cross-instance coordination.

security_headers.description: CSP, X-Frame-Options, HSTS, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy on all responses

ci.description: GitHub Actions: lint + tsc + npm audit on every PR and push to main

hls_media.description: R2 bucket, CDN delivery, private/public path split, correct Content-Type and CORS

dashboard.description: User dashboard: continue watching, saved, notifications, settings
